task_description: Add deck configuration to game setup (Core + expansion deck selection, Dynasty Invasion auto-inclusion for Sol/Luna, Kickstarter/Monster Pack optional cards), implement purchase restrictions for Sol/Luna clan monsters, and fix the entire game flow so the game is playable end-to-end through all seasons.

verification.summary: npx tsc -b passes with no type errors. npx vite build succeeds producing a valid bundle. No test framework exists in this project so test_quality is skipped.
